summary:
RESPONSE TO CRITICS AND PERSONAL ROLE: Brandon clarifies his position regarding his spiritual role, explicitly stating that he does not label himself a prophet but rather a watchman on the wall leading a prayer army. Brandon addresses critics who question his accuracy, explaining that he was in special education classes growing up and asserting that he simply shares what he sees without claiming infallibility.

CUBA AND HIDDEN WEAPONRY: Brandon recounts a vision of military planes with large sniffers flying over Cuba, searching for nuclear and radioactive devices encased in lead. Brandon explains that these devices were given to Fidel Castro by the Russians in the 1960s and hidden in underground bunkers. Additionally, Brandon foresees a future liberation of Cuba, marked by a massive spiritual revival across three major churches and a significant economic turnaround.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE AND ENERGY CRISIS: Brandon discusses a recent explosion at a major oil refinery in Tulsa, Oklahoma, noting that all 500 workers survived without injury, which he attributes to preemptive prayers. Brandon warns of future gas lines, gas wars reminiscent of the 1970s, and oil prices potentially reaching 200 dollars a barrel. Brandon also mentions a vision of the American economy being artificially propped up, likening it to being injected with a massive syringe of acid, alongside warnings of an impending economic decline and turbulent housing markets.

GLOBAL CONFLICTS AND DIPLOMACY: Brandon shares a vision of lavender fields over Russia, symbolizing an approaching season of peace and a temporary pause in the Russia-Ukraine war. Brandon describes agreements being made involving Vladimir Putin and a potential three-day ceasefire announced by Donald Trump. However, Brandon also warns of a provocation orchestrated by figures like Emmanuel Macron and Volodymyr Zelensky, who are allegedly pushing for World War III. Brandon details upcoming events including a weapon of mass destruction hitting Warsaw, Poland, and Turkey conspiring with Syria to attack Israel.

EXTRATERRESTRIAL DECEPTIONS AND DEMONIC ENTITIES: Brandon asserts that upcoming government UFO disclosures are part of a massive demonic deception rather than genuine alien contact. Brandon describes these entities as fallen angels and demonic spirits, specifically mentioning a twelve-foot-tall log creature and linking past incidents, such as a disturbance at a Miami mall, to these demonic manifestations designed to explain away future spiritual events.

CRYPTOCURRENCY AND BANKING MANIPULATION: Brandon discusses the Crypto Clarity Act and resistance from major banks like JP Morgan Chase, Bank of America, and Wells Fargo. Brandon recounts a vision of banking executives aggressively opposing stablecoin legislation because it threatens their monopoly and prevents them from leveraging deposits for executive bonuses. Brandon predicts extreme market volatility manipulated by these bankers to instill fear among the public regarding digital currencies.

IDOLATRY IN THE CHURCH: Brandon heavily condemns the recent dedication of a giant golden statue of Donald Trump at a golf course, led by a pastor. Brandon compares this act to the worship of a golden calf and the practices of dictators like Kim Jong-un, warning that it represents Antichrist symbolism and a dangerous compromise within the church. Brandon urges believers to strictly worship Jesus and abstain from idolizing any political figure.

UPCOMING PLAGUES AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon warns of a future biological weapon and a plague involving the Hantavirus, spread by injected rats released in Europe around 2027 or 2028. Brandon claims this event will be used to force the transition to a fully digital currency by declaring physical money contaminated. Furthermore, Brandon recounts visions of an 8.2 magnitude earthquake shaking the Vatican, a major volcano emerging from the water near Italy, demonic weather manipulation, and intense political theater including a black swan event resembling a magnified version of January 6th.
rawData: [May 12, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/2PoQzF7OhXc]-[Well, good afternoon family. Thank you for joining me again today. We are going to go over some things that are going on in the news. But I want to say this first off: we give all the glory to Jesus. Everything that we say in word and in deed, we give all to the glory of God every single time we do this broadcast because we all know that I cannot do this. It is all Him and it is His presence on me. And I am so grateful for you prayer warriors that take this seriously, that come out and pray, and pray over the nations, pray over the world. You know, I believe many hands make light work. And I have been asked a lot lately, Brandon, do you call yourself a prophet? I just call myself Brandon Biggs. I call myself a watchman on the wall. The Lord said, Raise up a million-man and woman prayer army. And in doing so, we will pray and we will change the nations through prayer. And I truly believe, like I said, many hands make light work. But you have to have a leader. And the Lord said, Lead the people. Teach them how to pray. Go and pray with the people. And so, I am excited that you all take it seriously. I am excited that every single one of you would want to pray with me and do the things that we do. It is not easy, pressing in and praying and you know, through the trenches basically is what I want to call it. But you know, I am grateful for every single one of you that pray. And so I believe everything the Lord has showed me in my opinion is by the spirit, by the unction of the spirit of the Lord. Everything. And so you know what? There are a lot of things that we have prayed over and we are about to go over some of them that you can see in the news. There is some of it that we have not seen come to pass yet. There is some of it I believe that people say, Well, is it a copout that you say that it is not being seen in the news that you call it out not being seen because you can stop it through prayer? Well, I believe true intercession stops a lot of things. But through the things that we see that are negative and we have called it out, that is a prayer fail. I truly believe that God calls us to raise up a standard against the devil so that we are prayer warriors. We are not people that are just beggars. We are believing believers. And we are fully persuaded that what God has promised, He is able also to perform. So when we set our sights on a target and we are praying by the spirit and by being led by the spirit, being filled and controlled by the Holy Ghost, we are believing believers that I believe will change things through prayer. And so that is what we will continue to do. So, I answer the critics. I answer the people that ask me questions and emails and they want to know. But I am just Brandon. I am no different than anybody else. Can I miss it? People say, Can you miss it, Brandon? Yes, I have missed it. Do I call—people say, Well, prophets do not miss it. Accurate prophets do not miss it. I have never labeled myself a prophet. I think after you repeat that so many times that I have never labeled myself a prophet and people call you a prophet. You know, I used to be in special ed classes when I was going through school, grade school, middle school, high school, and I was in special ed classes. I was in special learning. And a lot of these people that say the same thing over and over again are like those kids that were in those classes or had special needs. And I am not trying to be funny or rude, but I remember Mrs. Want, we had Mrs. Wayne in there and there was a boy named Eric and he asked the same thing over and said it all the time and he insinuated something because he had special needs. And I believe there is a lot of you that have special needs and you just do not realize it yet. I do not mean to be rude, but it is just flat truth. I tell you again, I do not call myself a prophet to you that have special needs. I am not a prophet. I am Brandon Biggs and I am here to pray with you. So, that may come across cranky, but I have to get across to the critics because my wife gets these emails and I am like, man, if you want to label me a prophet, then label me a prophet. If you want to label me whatever, all I am going to do is just keep doing what God has called me to do. Other than that, I will pray for you and that your special needs will be healed because that is what you need. And so, obviously, touch them, Father. Let us just pray for them right now. Father, just touch their special needs. Touch their darling hearts and Father, their stupid heads. Father, I thank you, Lord, that they have the mind of Christ and that they are able to get through this in life because they have a lot of hard things coming because they do not see it yet. He that has ears to hear, let him hear what the spirit is saying. And so, that is all I will say about that. And so, all right, let us go over some of the things the Lord has showed us, concerning the news. Now, the last time I was with you, we brought out a short and what we saw. Now, I want you to go ahead and play that short, son. Now, this is very important. This happened today. Do you want to go over some of this other stuff? I have this prepared here. Okay. Braden has all these, he has had three days to get everything ready. So he said, Do you remember I saw the sniffers? I saw these big noses on planes and they were flying over Cuba and I saw plane after plane flying over Cuba. And the Lord said, They are looking for nuclear and radioactive devices, but they are encased in lead. And as I was looking at the, they were encased in a lead, a thick lead, so that they could not see because I saw Fidel Castro—if I said his name right—he had a device given to him. I saw this by the spirit of the Lord, that he had a device given to him by the Russians clear back in the 60s and there were agreements there whenever Kennedy and there were things that were given and they had encased it in lead underneath the ground in a bunker and the Lord said they cannot see it with these sniffers and I saw these big noses, which is symbolic of something flying through the sky and I saw them that they were leaving out of Miami and these areas, Jacksonville and you know the Lord said they are flying out and I saw them going out over these areas and they were sniffing over Cuba. So I thought that was kind of interesting. Now this is in the US military surveillance flights near Cuba since February the 4th. So, they have a whole bunch of flights all going around Cuba because I saw these sniffers trying to sniff for bombs and so they will not be able to smell them because that—I do not know what lead would do. Now, I am going to tell you for where I am, I do not know what lead would do, but that is what I heard. And now, what other kind of metal? Aluminum or whatever, I do not know. It looked like a case that was about that thick. And as it was cased in a box that looked like a cube and they encased it and they covered it with dirt and I saw it in the ground. And so now this is what the Lord warned us about. And he told us to be praying over an exposure of this lead nuclear briefcase looking thing that I saw that looked from—it was a 70s looking bag. So that was what the Lord was showing me, was that it was something symbolic from the 70s. Well, 60s, 70s, you know that color, those old, you know, like when you look at the, like the bell-bottom jeans or whatever, the way the suitcases looked back then that you push the buttons on the top and they latch and you closed them. My grandmother had them. They had a key on them and you could lock them. It was something like that. It was encased in a thing like the '70s. I don't know what '60s baggage looked like, but I know what the '70s looked like. It was something like that; it looked like a briefcase. I saw it in a lead container, and we continued to pray over this. I saw that Cuba would be liberated. I saw that Cuba would have a major revival with three major churches coming from the east, the west, and the center part of Cuba. There would be a major outpouring of the Spirit of the Lord on this nation, and it would have a great economic turnaround from where it is right now. Next, do you have anything else? Okay, today... Go back to the oil refinery. Okay, today, go ahead and play it. We had a major oil refinery explode in Tulsa. Oil refineries are going up everywhere, folks, just like the Lord told us. He said they will try to send oil to $200 a barrel. Not financial advice, all in my opinion. I saw that there will be gas lines in the days ahead, and there will be gas wars like in the 1970s. Now, can we stop it? I believe we can lessen it. Obviously, even Trump says he can't believe that oil is not over $200 a barrel. It's very interesting. But as we see these incidents exploding in Tulsa now—even in Oklahoma—I never saw Tulsa. I'm just being real with you; I'm not going to add to or take away from anything that I've seen. I didn't see Tulsa. The Lord said, 'Pray over oil refineries in America.' And so, we pray over the Tuttle and Houston areas. We're praying over Louisiana still. This is pretty significant for Tulsa, but it's still burning. I don't know if that was accidental or sabotage, but it's a big oil refinery here in Oklahoma. This is what the Lord showed us on February 16th. It is a gas plant. I see at a facility, it is a gas plant. We pray over the workers that are there. I want to say this is Louisiana. Some things are by accident; some things are by design, like they're doing on purpose. But this is like an accident. I see these men with construction hats, those hard hats. I see white hard hats. Father, we thank you, Lord, that this plant does not go up. It will be on the news everywhere. I see it on the news on a live feed. They are watching this thing, and when this happens, I see it on local channels everywhere. It's on Fox; it's on all of them. Everybody is going to talk about this when it happens, and it's a major event. I'm looking at the news stations; I can see the TV. But it's about the workers. It's about the hand of the Lord. Some of them are believers. If you are familiar with this refinery, you know that it is one of the, according to its website, the largest private employer in St. Bernard Parish: 500 employees and 200 contractors working on the site. To hear that this happened and that there were no injuries is good news. It's absolutely great news. So many people work there and live around the plant, and I'm sure it was a concern for so many people who felt the explosion not only there in Chalmette in St. Bernard Parish, but as we mentioned, as far away as Algiers in New Orleans East. The Lord said, 'This group of men, they're in danger.' I see these men that are in danger. They're workers that work there. When this thing goes off, it will vaporize them. I'm talking about that heat. I'll count the men: one, two, three, four, five, six, seven. These are very prominent in front, but these others back here are farther away. These are the ones that are more dominant in harm's way. They're further out here. There's more people working there, but these are the ones at the forefront. I see these men—the brighter and more in-depth they are, the more in danger they are. Those men out here, I see bunches of them; I see the numbers 20 and 30. Then over here it's closer. These men are the ones that would be vaporized. They're over here, still in danger, but I'm talking right on top of it. There are levels to this vision. They're very prominent and in levels. None of them were touched. The refinery exploded, but every single one of them was protected. They said there were over 500 employees at that refinery, and not one was harmed. They felt the explosion clear across 30 miles plus away. It shook the city, and they said not one person was harmed. I just want to give all the glory to God for that. I believe the prayers of the righteous avail much. Praise the Lord. I believe it's the prayers of the saints that kept these people safe. All glory to God for every single one of them. It's exciting to see what we've set out to do—pray and see things change, to see this manifest. God is doing it. It's amazing to see what God is doing in these last days through this prayer channel. Not one person was injured. To not have one person pass away in an explosion of that magnitude? Glory to God. Usually, something of that magnitude that shook for 30 miles plus, with 500 people working there, you're usually going to have some kind of fatality. And there wasn't one. Amazing. Next, I want you to talk about Modi. Go ahead. Now, Modi is saying they're having an oil and gas crisis in India. He came out and told his people yesterday to conserve their gas like they did in COVID times, to carpool and work from home because they didn't have enough supply of gas or resources for their people. He's asking his people to stay home and work. Don't go to work, like during COVID. I don't know if he speaks English; I don't think he does either. You have to read the subtitles. But it's pretty serious whenever you tell your people to stay home from work, work from home, and start doing COVID restrictions. It's a pretty big deal. Then there's articles. Benjamin had an interview; he even said that China was giving secret weapons to Iran. This is pretty interesting. See the UFO files? He says the UFO files release is a drop in the bucket and a 'holy crap' moment is coming. What is it they're fixing to release? The Lord said that they would release it in stages. They were calling for it to be released all at once as shock and awe, but they're releasing it in stages. It's what the Holy Spirit warned us about, and it'll be the last phase. When are we going to see this next phase? When are we going to see the 'holy crap' moment? This guy's talking about it. We knew it by the leading of the Spirit when we prayed together that they're going to do it. They're going to try to freak everybody out. As of April 1st, the Lord says signs in the heavens all the way to Rosh Hashanah on September 11th of this year. He said an acceleration of birthing pains times two from where it is now. By the time we get to the fall, we won't recognize things even more. What are they going to release? What are they going to try to do now? Brandon, do you believe in aliens? No. I told you I believe this is demonic. I believe this is a fallen angel. This is demonic stuff. This is a great deception to explain away the rapture of the church, and I believe that's what's happening right now. When we see this alien deity, this demonic spirit, when they entertain angels unaware, the Lord said they will entertain demons unaware, a fallen angel, a demonic spirit in the days ahead. People can drive around and say, 'Well, you entertain angels unaware.' You don't know. This is a guy on the side of the road; you picked him up and a miracle happened or something, and it was an angel. Well, the Lord said, 'In these last days, there will be demonic deceptions.' I'm looking for it because I saw something that looked like a 12-foot-tall log creature that will be talked about in the days ahead. Now, people talk about Sasquatch, and the thing that happened in Miami a couple of years ago—was it back in 2023, 2024, whatever—whenever that was, 2022, it was during COVID, I think right after COVID, and there's a mall in Miami. It was some kind of demonic thing that was shown and everybody's freaking out. In 2023, it was a demonic thing in Miami. If you all remember that, they said it was gang-related; they didn't know, but there was some kind of demonic thing. And I'm expecting something to come on the TV and talk to a CNN news reporter in the days ahead. Why CNN? Well, because I don't think Fox would do it. I'm teasing. Of course CNN would. MSNBC would. Welcome. Okay, go ahead. I'm trying to find this. And then he said, 'Okay, now this is cool.' A lot of people say, 'Well, we don't see the stuff we're praying over because we see things and the Lord tells us to pray over these time frames.' The FBI stopped four terrorist attack plots in December of 2025 alone. On December 12, the FBI arrested four members of a far-left anti-government group on December 29. They stopped one in Pennsylvania, they stopped one in Texas, they stopped one—where is this one?—an ISIS soldier in North Carolina who wanted to conduct a mass casualty attack on New Year's Eve. Remember how much we prayed over New York City, over New Year's Eve, over Times Square? I saw drones and a major disruption coming against the American people for New Year's Eve, specifically about New York Times Square. Okay, so here's one that was completely stopped. Now, they didn't announce this to the people until now. Why? I don't know. And before December even arrived, the FBI stopped a planned ISIS-inspired Halloween terror attack near Detroit where a group was stockpiling weapons, scouting targets, and training at gun ranges. So, they're not telling you when they're stopping these people. So, it's not a prayer fail when you say, 'Well, we're not seeing it, Brandon.' The FBI has it right here telling you that they stopped them. Well, they need to tell us that our prayers are working. Wouldn't that be exciting? 'Hey, it was going to hit New York.' It even says it. See, he said Kash Patel reveals the chilling holiday terror plots the FBI federal agents quietly stopped. We never even knew about them. So, the haters are going to hate and they're going to tell you you aren't doing anything. But it's right there that we are stopping stuff. All glory to God, not Brandon Biggs. You got to know, it's encouraging when Braden finds this stuff. When I'm telling you it's highlighted about New Year's Eve and we must pray for protection against a bombing concerning New Year's Eve, it's right there: a New Year's Eve bombing targeting multiple businesses across Southern California. But none of them happened. All glory to God. So what else are they not telling us? We're praying and we will continue to pray because we're praying over this week, the mass prayer gathering in Washington, D.C. on Sunday. Trump is supposed to rededicate the nation back to the Lord. So, we will continue to pray over all of Washington, D.C. There are major prayer alerts to pray over the month of May, praying over our country. No plots, no plans for a Red Dawn experience for fertilizer concerning Timothy McVeigh trucks, vans, huge fertilizer barrels to find all this fertilizer the Lord showed us. It's still out there. I believe with all my heart, where did the fertilizer go in the trucks and the trains? Next, he quits, he resigns. That guy that's over England quits. He just quits. Now, the Lord didn't show us anything about that. I never saw him quit. But I think it's interesting what happened with the meeting when Trump and the king came together and had their meeting and then why would he just step down? What kind of scandal? What's going to happen with that? I don't know. Pretty interesting. Then we have Russia. Putin says he thinks the Russia-Ukraine war is coming to an end. Now what did the Lord show us about this? The lavender. Do you remember the lavender vision? Play it. Good job, son. You already had it ready. This is what the Lord showed us concerning Putin and Ukraine in the days ahead. 'On your call with President Putin today, do you think the war in Iran ends first or the war in Ukraine?' 'Ukraine.' Now, Putin is saying exactly what the Lord said. And the Lord said, 'Say this: Ukraine.' Now, listen to the lavender fields. It was lavender that you were looking at over Russia, Brandon. Lavender. It brings peace. When you breathe it in, it gives you peace. It's like we're calling peace over Russia and Ukraine. Lavender, when you breathe it in, relaxes you. We call peace over lavender. I see it. We call peace over Russia in Jesus' name. We thank you, Lord. Did you feel that? Whenever the atmosphere shifts, I can feel it shift when we call peace over Russia and Ukraine. Oh, Father, cool heads will prevail. We call the war to stop and cease in the name of Jesus. And Father, they would come to an agreement concerning the land. And Father, I thank you, Lord, there will be peace throughout the land. I see Macron. I see Zelensky. I call peace. The one thing that's holding it back is Ukraine joining NATO and it's being influenced by Zelensky and Macron. Days are numbered. I see an elderly man who will be pro-Russia and pro-Ukraine. We call peace over Russia and Ukraine. The lavender. I don't know if Russia is known for lavender, but I can smell it. It's what was growing over that land. When I was looking at Coachella then I went clear over there and I could smell lavender. I call peace over Russia and Ukraine tonight. I see Russia taking that land and there's a pause coming. Hear me? He wants a pause. There's a reason. Something is going on. There's a pause about the place. There's something about to take place. I see so much purple and stars. I see the purple and the colors. I see the stars. I see what looks like diamonds on the breath. The people of Russia breathe. It's like taking a deep breath, almost like a sigh of relief. Do you understand what I'm saying? There are agreements that have been made, and there are agreements that will be known soon. I see Zelensky. I hear them singing, Braden—the Russian choir again. You know what I'm talking about. I hear it. I hear the people of Russia. I see Turkey, and he's not satisfied. He's stirred up. But I can see Turkey, and it's about Israel. I can see Turkey devising a plan to come after Israel with Syria. It's Macron who is the problem because they want World War III. The white, red, and blue are rippling over this golden four. It's a golden four, looking almost like a bronzy brass gold, shining like a mirror. And it's a four flipped. What is that?. Breathe. Then I see the people praying and smelling the lavender. Peace. It's very interesting. I don't know what I'm seeing, but I'm telling you as I see it. Certain pockets of people are praying for peace because there's so much blood being shed over Ukraine. The people of Russia, I see the people praying. Gorbachev—he's the man bringing down the wall. Now, what did Putin say? Putin says he's ready for peace. Will we see it? I believe if we keep praying, it could be a four-year window, a four-month window, or four weeks. Is that a four-week window? Maybe we'll see by the 17th, which is Sunday. It'll be a month; it's four weeks. From the 17th of April to the 17th of May is four weeks. I'm just trying to think what the Lord is saying. I saw four. Trump announces—when did he say this? May 8th. Trump announces a surprise three-day ceasefire in the Russia-Ukraine war. Trump says the request was made directly by him and was agreed upon by Putin and Zelensky. Will we see this stick? Because I saw a provocation coming. You see the peace, and then you see a major weapon used that has never been used before over Poland. The Lord said, 'I saw them trying to use long-range missiles to hit the Kremlin in the days ahead that look like Tomahawks.' But I saw a weapon of mass destruction. It was not a nuclear weapon. It's a season of a little bit of a reprieve so that they can get around to help Iran, because they're preoccupied with Ukraine. We saw Putin and Iran having meetings last week. I like the Second Amendment, so don't get mad at me. The banks, in my opinion—remember the rocket ship trying to take off? They came to an agreement in the days ahead concerning the Clarity Act. They were shaking hands, but the guy over JP Morgan Chase was throwing a fit. Bank of America and Wells Fargo were there, but BlackRock was off in the distance. He was outside of the meeting. He wasn't there. But I saw Chase, Bank of America, Wells Fargo, and some of these other major banks were there, and they were throwing a fit about the Clarity Act. Well, it's happening just like the Lord said. He said, "For decades, these banks have treated our deposits like their personal piggy bank, paying you next to nothing while lending your money out for massive profits and executive bonuses. So, they're having a real hard time." And look what I didn't see: Citibank. All I saw was Chase, Wells Fargo, and Bank of America. And they were the three banks that I saw that were throwing a huge fit. Now they have two other banks there. So now that active stablecoin threat to break their monopoly and give you actual financial freedom, they're running to Congress screaming about threats to economic growth and financial stability. And I said, "They will..." I saw very turbulent waters and the coins were bouncing around, and then all of a sudden they had a hold of it and they will manipulate it. And I saw great green things, green skyscrapers, great green and then great red too. When I saw—and this is all my opinion—when I saw the clarity come, it was a black line. And I showed you it was like this; it was a black line, as black like onyx. And I saw Garlinghouse smiling. He said, "All we need is clarity and then the rest will handle itself." And all of a sudden, I saw it try to go up. And the bankers would try to manipulate it to get people afraid of it. So there were great highs and great lows with rugpulls. Now, all in my opinion, not financial advice. So, you pray about it. It's all interesting because of what we see in the news after we pray about it for weeks in advance. When did I have that vision? Clear back in February. It was February. And so here we are in May and the bankers are fighting. So they wanted to bring it to a vote on the 14th which is Thursday, right? Is it Thursday or Friday? The 14th is Friday, right? Yeah. So Thursday they want to vote on it. Interesting. See, "Senate Banking Committee schedules Crypto Clarity Act vote for May 14th." So that's a day to pray. So they want to vote on this thing on the 14th. So those banks are trying to throw their weight around. "You better do what we tell you to do or we're not going to help support you." You know how they do it. They bully you. And so then the next thing you know they're going to vote. So what will they vote? Will they vote it down or will they vote it through? "US banks reject Clarity Act stablecoin deal days before a Senate vote." Yeah, so they rejected it. It was like a part of it. I'm trying to figure out the section. Section 404 of the Clarity Act framework, stablecoin rewards deposit. So compromise sought to ban stablecoin rewards that look like bank deposit interest while preserving some, so they don't want you to stake your money in there and then pay you like an interest account like it would be at the savings account at your bank. So they're throwing a fit about it. Is that what I'm understanding? If so, tell me in the comment section. Say, "Brandon, you're way off." I don't know. They can read it. Y'all are smarter than me.
